name: Doctor Who The Edge of Time

reviews.review_title: I’m am a big fan of the game
reviews.review_description: I’m a big fan of the show. My favorite doctors is the 13th doctor and when I heard this of a VR game, I downloaded it and it was the best experience when you start a level you can walk around the police box and it looks like it’s actually bigger on the inside. That’s a cool effect I liked hopefully they make a sequel of the game. ￼👌
It's just a puzzle game it shows things of Dr who and some parts did scare me but it's just a puzzle game
It's a good game just a little short

reviews.review_title: THIS COULD BE SO MUCH MORE!
reviews.review_description:
So much more…. But it’s not fair. This is our reward. 

The game is good foundational work for what could be a truly innovative and immersive way to experience the whoniverse but the gameplay is very linear and doesn’t give much control to the player so here’s what should be done 

- actual piloting of the tardis instead of a loading screen (I know there’s semi piolting ONCE at the beginning) 

- bring physical characters into the game like companions and I don’t know the doctor instead of a voice over and occasional hologram

-interactivity, the game only really lets you interact with plot driving items (which isn’t much) the things you do interact with are usual done by grabbing something (holding a button) sonicing something ( holding a button) or shooting ( pressing a button). The tardis is also essential just a big room with nothing to do in it :( 

-Content. The scenes are small, make the environments bigger and add more of them. Maybe let the player hop between these environments on their own accord and interconnect them throughout the story.

-Longer story. Not much to say here, the game is pretty short. The narrative also could have been improved by perhaps lengthening the final boss fight (beat her in like 20 seconds) so was a bit anti climatic IMO. 

-The game needs some patches, occasionally the game gets stuck on a black screen and Ihave to double press the oculus button or the players height gets extremely short or tall and I have to reset the boundary to get it working . Also saw  a few in game bugs here and there 


Overall I think there is still some joy you can get out of this game  but because it’s so bare bones it will get dry quickly. Hey I had fun for parts of this game but I think what hurt this games rating is that there was so much potential, initially I was going to give 3 stars but I think the devs gave up on this which is sad to see:(

reviews.review_title: Good but not much to do.
reviews.review_description: It's a nice game, you follow the storyline but it's very short and there is nothing to do once you have collected all the collectibles in the storyline. The maps are small and there are no alternative endings. There are no side quests there is just the main storyline which makes it a bit boring as you can't do anything but the story.
This Doctor Who really disappointed me as we could have gotten so much more like more of the Daleks, weeping angels and the Cybermen i could have liked it if we had customisable sonic and interior

reviews.review_title: Game is great, price is not
reviews.review_description: Far too short for $20, finished in less than an hour. I regret buying this, when I had multiple choices of games that were $15, older and newer, all having far more content. Really disappointed.

I bought this a while ago and just haven’t gotten around to playing it until now. I am in LOVE with the Doctor Who series, so I was incredibly excited to play this game.

Unfortunately, I couldn’t get past the first puzzle… I can’t grab everything, nor can I enter the safe number. I can only grab the phone, the door, drawers, and the electrical piece that controls the generator. None of the photos can be moved nor the safe combination entered.

THIS IS NOT WHAT I PAID FOR SMH. This game is too expensive to be this bugged.
If someone has any advice for me, PLEASE message me. I really want to play this game.

one the preview it showed the 10th doctors tardis however when playing it was the 13th doctors TARDIS. good game to say the lest I enjoyed it however I feel the price is to high for such a quick and easy game. I’m not sure if the game has unlock able TARDIS 
available however I was disappointed when I saw which TARDIS i was placed in after seeing the 10th doctors TARDIS I would love to have more games like this including more game play and harder puzzles to figure out .
this app has crashed on my headset and is not being supported by meta anymore loved the game but its useless now

reviews.review_title: Worthy attempt to translate the TV show
reviews.review_description:
The Edge of Time is definitely one of most ambitious and big budget attempts to date. It also comes with 2020’s Time Lord Victorious DLC bundled in for free.

There was definitely a thrill to stepping out of the TARDIS on to an unknown planet. That worked each time arrived in a new location. Most of the game is puzzle solving, moving objects about, slotting them into holes. Or combing objects to create an effect. Zapping items with the somic screwdriver was a reliable move. Most of the puzzles were an easy to medium challenge, apart from one aboard a spaceliner involving reflecting a laser beam with rotating mirrors to activate doors, that eventually I had to look up the solution on YouTube. As with many VR games at the moment there is a distinct escape room feel.

I’ve enjoyed playing this game and think it deserves to be better known. It’s a sincere attempt to put the player inside a Doctor Who adventure and translates a fair amount of the feel of the Thirteenth Doctor’s era. It’s an accessible game for both experience VR players and first timers.

I personally love doctor who. But this just butchers is.

The game is personally frustrating, I understand it’s meant to be challenging but they could make it a bit more clear. There is a huge lack of instruction so you’re left wandering the entire map to figure out what you’re mean to do. 

You walk at a pace slower than that of a sloth and get respawned when you try to look over a ledge to try and take in the environment.

Overall not a very good game.
If you can put up with Jody Whittakers annoying chippy voice then you might like this ....

developer_response.body: Hi Nikwik, I'm sorry you're not a fan of Jodie. As she is the current Doctor and as a game set in the modern era that is why she's the lead character. We have obviously also made this very clear in our marketing too, so it's a bit tough to get a 1 star review for this. As an indie developer we would ask you to consider your review, these do make a huge difference to the games fortunes.

reviews.review_description: I just started.

reviews.review_title: Had to update 1 last time 5 stars!
reviews.review_description: I am probably 3 quarters thru the game got my 2nd time crystal. This is just stellar! I am a huge fan of the show, and you guys did so amazing. So scary, and great graphics.  I just love it. Thanks so much for keeping me so entertained during the Apocalypse.. LOL

Unfortunately my experience with this game was very glitchy and the textures/graphics left a lot to be desired. Several times I had to turn the game off and back on to make a sequence of events happen. When it did work the story and puzzles where moderately fun, and a few of the scares made me jump. I also noticed that the first and third chapter looked noticeably better than other chapters, perhaps because of the quests limitations? Would love to see a patch. I would gladly add a star or two.

developer_response.body: Hi Brenthas1, Thanks for your feedback, we’ve just launched a 3rd patch   which should rectify many of the reported bugs. Could you give it another try and let us know what you think?

reviews.review_description:
To start, I love Doctor Who. But this game was horrible. It tries to be a puzzler, shooter, stealth, horror, narrative experience and does none of those things well.

The puzzles are hampered by glitchy controls and magically appearing items. The shooting was the clunkiest I have ever seen in a video game VR or not. Targeting was glacial and firepower basically nonexistent. The stealth was repetitive, literally reduced to throw item to distract. Horror was not scary at all and had no real tension. The narrative was poorly written stereotypes with horrible graphics that put classic doctor who baddies where they did not make sense. Each chapter felt disjointed from each other and the lack of notification that you died was frustrating. Lack of teleportation made navigation a slow tedious process and lack of any navigation or much interaction at all in the last chapter was plain boring.

Avoid!

developer_response.body: Difficult to respond to this as sounds like you really hated the game, which is hard to read for us Devs. We'd love you to give it another go and see if the recent patches change your opinion of the game. One thing to note from your feedback is there is a teleport function using the A button.

reviews.review_description: This is the greatest game I ever played in VR now I get to know the Doctor Who world in a cool and interactive way.

developer_response.body: Thanks Jedi07 - that makes us very happy!

reviews.review_title: Was a great addition counting the ship
reviews.review_description: Was top notch
